descriptions.text:
Super Mario World: Christmas Edition including the Winter/Ice EXGFX made by the SMWCentral Community. Each level ,except for the Switch Palaces, is Winter/Ice themed. I used all custom snow sprites that I could find and used them in many different ways.

This hack is very traditional and awesome to play during the Christmas days with your friends or family! It has the perfect length to be played in one sitting, expect 2 or 3 hours.
